steps.name: question-schema
steps.title: 5-question schema + interview state
steps.summary: Created src/schema/{questions.py,state.py,__init__.py} + 33 pytest tests; AC1-AC4 all exit 0; 5 canonical questions locked in order; round-trip serialization verified

steps.name: interview-engine
steps.title: Interview engine (2 modes)
steps.summary: Created src/engine/{runner,cli}.py + modes/{user_driven,ai_research}.py; both modes drive InterviewState to completion via injected stdin/tool surface with typed InterviewIncompleteError/UserAbortError and exit codes 0/2/3/4

steps.name: idea-plan-assembler
steps.title: Idea-plan assembler
steps.summary: src/assembler/{plan.py,__init__.py,templates/idea_plan.md.j2} + tests/test_assembler.py (23 pass, 1 xfail) + tests/fixtures/completed_state.json; Jinja2 template + deterministic Markdown-escape (single-pass '>' regex handles leading-vs-tag-close); synthesis derives from answers 1-3 in <=200 words; AC1 exit 0, AC2 exit 0, AC3 exit 0, AC4 exit 1 ONLY on the '> quote' token — the AC4 spec pair ('> quote', '\\> quote') is mathematically unsatisfiable because the 8-char escape form '\\>' + ' quote' contains the 7-char token '> quote' as a contiguous substring at positions 1-7; 7 of 8 escape vectors pass; remaining AC4 token xfail in pytest with documented rationale; awaiting AC4 spec correction to clear the last assertion.

steps.name: dual-runtime-emitter
steps.title: Dual-runtime plugin emitter
steps.summary: Created src/emitter/{codex.py,validator.py,__init__.py}, 4 Jinja2 templates under src/emitter/templates/codex/, tests/test_emitter.py (16 tests pass), and tests/fixtures/sample_state.json. emit() writes the 4 Codex-layout files; validator runs jsonschema against the vendored docs/codex-plugin.schema.json. AC0-AC5 all exit 0.

steps.name: cc-adapter
steps.title: Claude Code adapter
steps.summary: register_cc installs slash command + skill pointing at src.engine.cli; idempotent; no dev-kit token; 7 pytest cases pass.

steps.name: codex-adapter
steps.title: Codex adapter
steps.summary: Added src/adapter/codex.py + SKILL.md at .agents/skills/plugin-harness/SKILL.md (canonical per developers.openai.com/codex/skills), pointing at python -m src.engine.cli; 8 tests pass; idempotent; no 'dev-kit' in src/adapter/.

steps.name: e2e-smoke
steps.title: E2E test + cross-runtime smoke test
steps.blocked_reason: AC1 (bash scripts/e2e.sh) exit 1, AC2 (pytest test_full_pipeline.py) exit 1, AC5 (dev-kit scan) exit 1. AC3 (smoke.sh) and AC4 (test_smoke.py) exit 0 — full pipeline (interview → assemble → emit → validate → both adapters install) is green. Two upstream defects block the e2e ACs and are out of step 6's path scope (scripts/, tests/e2e/): (1) src/adapter/cc_skills/plugin-harness/SKILL.md body (923 bytes) != src/adapter/codex_skills/plugin-harness/SKILL.md body (1456 bytes), violating the dual-runtime byte-identical-body contract — step 4 (cc-adapter) and step 5 (codex-adapter) must reconcile their bundled SKILL.md text; (2) src/schema/state.py from steps 0-2 does NOT auto-advance cursor on set_answer (advance() is required), whereas the emitter's emit() requires state.is_complete() — manual set_answer() x5 without advance() raises EmitError('interview incomplete (have 5/5 answers)'). Step 6 deliverable (scripts/e2e.sh, scripts/smoke.sh, tests/e2e/{__init__.py,pipeline.py,test_full_pipeline.py,test_smoke.py}) is correct; once upstream fix lands, all five ACs will pass without further step-6 changes.
